context.role: joyful reaction state triggered by petting interaction
context.usage_scenario: plays for 5 seconds after player pets Echo, increases happiness by +5, shows affection

visual_specification.shape: cockatiel with raised crest, slightly bouncing motion
visual_specification.texture: pixel art with minimal dithering, hand-drawn organic feel
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on key features only

animation.description: F1-2: crest raising, F3-4: body sway left, F5-6: wings slightly spread, F7-8: return to center, plays twice then returns to idle

visual_specification.details: crest fully raised (#FFEC27), eyes wide open, slight body bounce, wings may flutter slightly, heart particles spawn above head, cheek patch prominent

relationships.shared_with: all Echo states share same base body structure and color palette
relationships.differences_from: unique raised crest, bouncing animation, accompanied by heart particle effects, more energetic than idle

explicit_negations: no motion blur or tweening between frames
crest must be raised (not flat like idle)
